theme.description: Premium Light Theme with glassmorphism, soft gradients, and rounded cards. Inspired by the structure of Linear and Arc but infused with a warm, elegant pastel palette.

rules: No Inter or generic fonts for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase, tiny, and wide tracking.
Max heading size text-6xl for hero.

glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers, floating navs, and elevated cards.
Class pattern: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm.
Ensure backdrop-saturate-150 is applied if supported.
gradients: Soft mesh gradients using primary and secondary colors as background blobs.
Subtle gradient text for accentuating key words like 'AI Career Copilot'.

layouts.dashboard: Sidebar (left) + Navbar (top) layout. Dashboard cards should have a subtle border-radius (lg or xl) and generous padding (p-6).
layouts.landing_page: Hero section centered or staggered with 3D abstract shapes floating. High white space. Generous padding (py-24 or py-32). Bento grid for features.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for cards. gap-6, gap-8 for grids.

components.cards: Soft-glass cards with delicate 1px border. Avoid standard rigid cards.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or smooth rounded (rounded-xl) with interaction animations (hover:scale-105 transition-transform). Coral or Peach for primary CTA.
components.navigation: Visible desktop navigation. Glassmorphism header over scrolling content.

motion.interactions: Hover states (translate-y-1, subtle shadow increase). Click/press states. Entrance animations for dashboard cards (staggered fade-up).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-transform, transition-opacity, transition-colors. Do NOT use transition-all.

3d_libraries: Framer Motion for entrance and hover animations.
Optional: Spline for a hero 3D pastel object if interactive, else use the provided static abstract images.
media.icons: lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for soft, modern rounded icons matching the pastel aesthetic.

image_urls.description: Student working on laptop for the landing page hero or feature section
Student avatar / dashboard user profile picture
Abstract 3D pastel shapes for background floating elements
GitHub Logo for GitHub Intelligence Integration

accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio is maintained, especially on light pastel backgrounds.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds on text overlays.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a premium light theme SaaS interface. Avoid standard Vercel dark mode or default templates. Create soft glassmorphic cards (bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-lg, delicate border). Apply generous spacing (p-6, gap-8). Use 'Outfit' for striking headlines and 'Manrope' for readable body text. Implement Sidebar + Top Navbar layout for the dashboard. Strictly follow the provided color palette (Coral, Peach, Cream, Lavender, Sage Green). All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
Do not center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use modern pill-shaped or smoothly rounded buttons with explicit hover states.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
